result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= timestamp without time zone
LINE 8:     AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 mo...
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events,
         MIN(ch.createddate) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS first_owner_change_dt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with no owner changes recorded (treat as not transferred)
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.createddate, cb.closeddate, cb.ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate,
         c.closeddate,
         c.ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= (DATE '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events,
         MIN(ch.createddate) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS first_owner_change_dt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  -- cases with no owner changes recorded (treat as not transferred)
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.createddate, cb.closeddate, cb.ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closeddate - createddate)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH case_base AS (
  SELECT c.id AS case_id,
         c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
         c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts,
         c.ownerid AS ownerid
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= (TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02' - INTERVAL '4 months')
), owner_assignments AS (
  SELECT ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner') AS owner_change_events
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), non_transferred_cases AS (
  SELECT cb.case_id, cb.created_ts, cb.closed_ts, cb.ownerid
  FROM case_base cb
  LEFT JOIN owner_assignments oa ON oa.case_id = cb.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(oa.owner_change_events, 0) = 0
), handle_times AS (
  SELECT ownerid AS agent_id,
         EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (closed_ts - created_ts)) AS handle_seconds
  FROM non_transferred_cases
), per_agent AS (
  SELECT agent_id,
         COUNT(*) AS case_count,
         AVG(handle_seconds) AS avg_handle_seconds
  FROM handle_times
  GROUP BY agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
)
SELECT agent_id
FROM per_agent
ORDER BY avg_handle_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
